title: thelypteris columbiana
intro: Thelypteris columbiana, also known as Columbian lady fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Thelypteridaceae. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful in treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Thelypteris columbiana include reducing inflammation, soothing skin irritations, and supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant can be used to make teas, infusions, and topical creams, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human consumption.
